step_rationale: Endothelial-cell-viability regulator; mechanotransduction and flow-response control; targeted by miR-32-5p.
mechanism: KLF2 downregulation impairs endothelial shear-stress sensing and homeostasis, promoting endothelial erosion and Type 1 MI.

references.title: Silence of miR-32-5p promotes endothelial cell viability by targeting KLF2 and serves as a diagnostic biomarker of acute myocardial infarction.
Genetic variant at coronary artery disease and ischemic stroke locus 1p32.2 regulates endothelial responses to hemodynamics.
references.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
